name: Quick Intel
description:
AI-powered smart contract security scanner covering 63 blockchains. Detects honeypots, scam patterns, buy/sell/transfer taxes, contract ownership risks, mint/burn/blacklist capabilities, proxy contracts, fee modification risks, LP locks, liquidity analysis, suspicious functions, known scam wallet funding, and fund theft vulnerabilities. Powered by Quick Intel's proprietary qHash fingerprinting system.

$0.03 per scan via x402 micropayments. Accepts USDC on 9 EVM chains: Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Avalanche, Unichain, Linea, and MegaETH.

Endpoint: AI-powered smart contract security scanner covering 63 blockchains. Detects honeypots, scam patterns, buy/sell/transfer taxes, contract ownership risks, mint/burn/blacklist capabilities, proxy contracts, fee modification risks, LP locks, liquidity analysis, suspicious functions, known scam wallet funding, and fund theft vulnerabilities. Powered by Quick Intel's proprietary qHash fingerprinting system.

$0.03 per scan via x402 micropayments. Accepts USDC on 9 EVM chains: Base, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Avalanche, Unichain, Linea, and MegaETH.

Endpoint: https://x402.quickintel.io/v1/scan/full
